title: HexColorChat
description: A mod that lets you use gradients on servers that support them
body:
🎨 AutomaticColorcodes – Custom Chat Color Presets AutomaticColorcodes lets you flex fully customizable chat colors using hex codes. Automatically adds color codes before every letter you type—so you type normal, but your messages show up dripped out in color.

🧰 Features ✅ Auto-color every letter with real hex codes (e.g. #ff0000H#00ff00i)

✅ 5 editable presets, each with 10 hex codes per message

✅ Easy-to-use GUI (press Right Shift) to edit or switch presets

✅ Works on servers that support hex colors

✅ Clean gradients or wild rainbow text—up to you

🖱️ How to Use Open the GUI with Right Shift

Choose or edit a preset

Type as usual—your message will show up with the selected style

📦 Compatibility ✅ Minecraft 1.21.5

✅ Java 21

✅ Fabric Loader

✅ Servers that support #rrggbb hex color formatting
